Notice Of Setting Hearing Regarding Certificates Of Merit
Off Calendar May-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JANE CC ROE, AN INDIVIDUAL's Hearing Regarding Certificates Of Merit.

Having reviewed the certificates of merit in camera, the court finds good cause for filing of the action.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
